info.title: MiR Fleet Compatibility API
info.description:
This API provides RESTful endpoints in the format of software 3.X.

The API is intended to support sites that have an existing integration system that is compatible with the 3.x MiR Fleet API system.

parameters.name: whitelist
parameters.description: Indicate which fields to include in the response (comma-separated), for example: "guid,name", or "all" to include all fields.

post.summary: Execute multiple API calls in a single request.
